title: Figure 1 in A comprehensive phylogenetic analysis of Grapsoidea crabs (Decapoda: Brachyura) based on mitochondrial cytochrome oxidase subunit 1 (CO1) genes
author: Xin, Zhaozhe
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. PCR images of eight Grapsoidea species. "1" is S. sinensis; "2" is C. sinensis; "3" is P. bidens; "4" is H. latimera; "5" is H. tientsinensis; "6" is H. wuana; "7" is H. sanguineus; "8" is V. litterata.
steps_raw: Figure 1. PCR images of eight Grapsoidea species. "1" is S. sinensis; "2" is C. sinensis; "3" is P. bidens; "4" is H. latimera; "5" is H. tientsinensis; "6" is H. wuana; "7" is H. sanguineus; "8" is V. litterata.
